title: Adare sitha Sanasana Adare
body:
[INTRO]
#D - C - 
#G/C G/C D -
#D C G D
#D C G D

[CHORUS]
#D -                     G/C      C
Aadaree... Sitha Sanasana Aaadare..
#D -                     G/C      C
Aadaree... Sitha Sanasana Aaadare..
#D
Sanda Sisile
#C
Tharu Eliye
#G
Mada pawane
    
Hamuwenawada
#D -                     G/C      C
Aadaree... Sitha Sanasana Aaadare..
